response.justification: Bogdan brings 10+ years of full-stack experience that comfortably exceeds the 6+ year bar, with strong overlap on the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker/Kubernetes) and directly relevant AI-agent work at re:cinq, including MCP code generators and agentic frameworks. He demonstrates senior engineering practices (TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development), shows architectural breadth across web/mobile/embedded, and has a CS degree plus a track record of teaching and OSS contribution. Gaps around Nest.js, Vitest, and Kotlin are minor and easily ramped given his polyglot background.
strengths: Direct AI-agent / MCP experience aligned with the role's tooling focus
Deep TypeScript/Node.js + React + MongoDB + AWS + Docker/K8s stack match
Strong craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, code reviews, teaching/workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed (Jest/Playwright also unstated)
No Kotlin experience for the secondary JVM services
Heavy historical DLang focus may signal slower ramp on idiomatic modern Nest.js patterns
